query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sentinel_customisations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  sentinelId INT NOT NULL,
  customTone TEXT,
  customFocus TEXT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_user_sentinel (userId, sentinelId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sentinel_customisations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  sentinelId INT NOT NULL,
  customTone TEXT,
  customFocus TEXT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_user_sentinel (userId, sentinelId)
);
